# v79 — σ-Simulacrum

Canonical directory: [`src/v79/`](../../src/v79/).

## Abstract

Goals:
  - > 100 000 PASS rows, 0 FAIL
  - ASAN / UBSAN clean
  - covers all ten primitives and the SSL VM
  - deterministic: `check-v79` is reproducible run-to-run

## Source

- `src/v79/creation_os_v79.c`
- `src/v79/simulacrum.c`
- `src/v79/simulacrum.h`

## Self-test

```bash
make check-v79
```

## Relation to the σ-stack

Layer membership (cf. `docs/AGI_ARCHITECTURE.md`):

- Layer 2 (Generation) support kernels: σ-Wormhole, σ-Neuron, σ-Reservoir, σ-Liquid, σ-Pointer, σ-License.

## Source-header excerpt

```c
/* SPDX-License-Identifier: AGPL-3.0-or-later
 *
 * Creation OS v79 — σ-Simulacrum self-test driver.
 *
 * Goals:
 *   - > 100 000 PASS rows, 0 FAIL
 *   - ASAN / UBSAN clean
 *   - covers all ten primitives and the SSL VM
 *   - deterministic: `check-v79` is reproducible run-to-run
 */

#include "simulacrum.h"

#include <inttypes.h>
#include <stdint.h>
#include <stdio.h>
#include <string.h>
#include <time.h>

/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */
/*  Tiny test harness                                                  */
/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */

static uint64_t g_pass = 0;
static uint64_t g_fail = 0;

#define CHECK(cond) do {                                         \
    if ((cond)) { ++g_pass; }                                    \
    else {                                                       \
        if (g_fail < 16) {                                       \
            fprintf(stderr, "FAIL %s:%d: %s\n",                  \
                    __FILE__, __LINE__, #cond);                  \
        }                                                        \
        ++g_fail;                                                \
    }                                                            \
```
